privileged_info_summary: The Vicidial campaign target is EMRGNCY, which is synthetically generated via setup scripts. The task requires configuring specific survey parameters, specifically setting Survey First Audio File to vm-greeting, DTMF Digits to 1, Not Interested Digit to 1, Not Interested Status to SAFE, Wait Seconds to 5, Method to EXTENSION, Extension to 8300, and No-Response Action to OPTIN. These exact parameters are enforced by verifier.py scoring logic.
